mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE following_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId}

SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.profile_image, u.bio FROM follows f JOIN users u ON u.id = f.follower_id WHERE f.following_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.profile_image, u.bio FROM follows f JOIN users u ON u.id = f.following_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
